title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Unveils Fraud Monitor, Expands Portfolio
text: Jack Henry (JKHY) introduces Payrailz Fraud Monitor, which offers real-time fraud detection across multiple payment types.

title: Jack Henry™ Launches Real-Time Payments Fraud Feature
text: Real-Time, AI-Based Fraud Mitigation Feature Supports Multiple Payment Types MONETT, Mo. , June 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today the launch of Payrailz®  Fraud Monitor, a cloud-native, AI-based feature of the Payrailz Digital Payments Platform that provides real-time fraud detection when payment transactions are initiated.

title: Saco & Biddeford Savings Institution Selects Jack Henry for Service and Innovation
text: Maine's oldest bank plans to improve customer and employee experiences with added efficiency and modern solutions MONETT, Mo. , June 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JHKY) announced today that Saco & Biddeford Savings Institution (SBSI), a mutual savings bank founded in 1827, selected Jack Henry to modernize its technology infrastructure and grow small business banking.

title: Jack Henry Executives to Speak at Upcoming Events
text: MONETT, Mo. , June 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that management will be participating in several upcoming conferences.
